001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggDao;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Egg;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchEggAggregate;
007import java.util.ArrayList;
008import java.util.List;
009import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
010import javax.inject.Inject;
011
012public class EggRepositoryImpl implements EggRepository {
013
014  private final EggDao eggDao;
015
016  @Inject
017  EggRepositoryImpl(EggDao eggDao) {
018    this.eggDao = eggDao;
019  }
020
021  @Override
022  public LiveData<List<BatchEggAggregate>> getViabilityPerBatch() {
023    return eggDao.selectViabilityPerBatch();
024  }
025
026  @Override
027  public LiveData<List<Egg>> getByEggGroupId(long eggGroupId) {
028    return eggDao.selectByEggGroup(eggGroupId);
029  }
030
031  @Override
032  public LiveData<Egg> get(long id) {
033    return eggDao.select(id);
034  }
035
036  @Override
037  public CompletableFuture<List<Egg>> fetchByEggGroupId(long eggGroupId) {
038    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> eggDao.fetchByEggGroup(eggGroupId));
039  }
040
041  @Override
042  public CompletableFuture<Long> save(Egg egg) {
043    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
044      if (egg.getId() == 0L) {
045        long id = eggDao.insert(egg);
046        egg.setId(id);
047        return id;
048      } else {
049        eggDao.update(egg);
050        return egg.getId();
051      }
052    });
053  }
054
055  @Override
056  public CompletableFuture<Void> saveAll(List<Egg> eggs) {
057    return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
058      if (eggs == null || eggs.isEmpty()) {
059        return;
060      }
061
062      boolean allNew = true;
063      for (Egg egg : eggs) {
064        if (egg.getId() != 0L) {
065          allNew = false;
066          break;
067        }
068      }
069
070      if (allNew) {
071        List<Long> ids = eggDao.insertAll(eggs);
072        for (int i = 0; i < eggs.size() && i < ids.size(); i++) {
073          Long id = ids.get(i);
074          if (id != null) {
075            eggs.get(i).setId(id);
076          }
077        }
078      } else {
079        eggDao.update(eggs);
080      }
081    });
082  }
083
084  @Override
085  public CompletableFuture<Void> seedEggsForGroup(long eggGroupId, int initialEggCount) {
086    return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
087      if (initialEggCount <= 0) {
088        return;
089      }
090
091      List<Egg> eggs = new ArrayList<>();
092      for (int eggNumber = 1; eggNumber <= initialEggCount; eggNumber++) {
093        Egg egg = new Egg();
094        egg.setEggGroupId(eggGroupId);
095        egg.setEggNumber(eggNumber);
096        egg.setHatchStatus(null);
097        egg.setFinalNotes(null);
098        eggs.add(egg);
099      }
100
101      List<Long> ids = eggDao.insertAll(eggs);
102      for (int i = 0; i < eggs.size() && i < ids.size(); i++) {
103        Long id = ids.get(i);
104        if (id != null) {
105          eggs.get(i).setId(id);
106        }
107      }
108    });
109  }
110}
